As a result, building a counterbalancing coalition in the region would be the better option. Decision-makers in United States are considering their possible courses of action. How should they proceed?
column2: Bandwagon with the rising power in hopes of making joint gains
column3: Balance against the rising power by attempting to build a coalition with other states in the region
